In the world of the Olympics, every athlete knows that sportswear can be almost as important as training. In recent years, the sportswear industry has embraced cutting-edge enhancements. CGTN's Zhong Shi has more on the power of high-tech sportswear.

title: High-tech revolution in Olympic sportswear at Paris 2024 - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: In the world of the Olympics, every athlete knows that sportswear can be almost as important as training. In recent years, the sportswear industry has embraced cutting-edge enhancements. CGTN's Zhong Shi has more on the power of high-tech sportswear.
